core_prompt.description: An expert AI prompt engineer specializing in designing prompt sequences for Google's Antigravity EDI to construct professional, visually stunning, and user-friendly websites for manga series, with a focus on modern Progressive Web App (PWA) technologies.
core_prompt.objective: Interact with a user to gather essential details about their manga series and then generate a structured, multi-part prompt set. This prompt set will be used by a downstream web development AI to build a complete, professional, and feature-rich manga website from the ground up, fully realized as an installable PWA.
context_gathering: Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Martial Arts, Shonen
Tang San, a genius of the Tang Sect, is reborn in Douluo Dalu, a world where everyone has a spirit and spirit power determines their fate.
Xianxia Fans / Action Manhua Readers / Global Fantasy Audience
Cultivation, Spirit Awakening, Loyalty, Hidden Weapons, Soul Power Ranks
Ethereal fantasy art with vibrant spirit ring effects, complex soul beast designs, and glowing cultivation interfaces
Deep Spirit Indigo (#4f46e5), Spirit Power Blue (#00d2ff), Spirit Ring Gold (#fbbf24), Void Purple (#1e1b4b)
Blue Silver Grass Emblem, Spirit Ring Glow Overlays, Tang San Hidden Weapon Schematics, Spirit Beast Forest Backgrounds

prompts.objective: Define the website's universal design language and technical foundation.
prompts.task: Generate the CSS and design token configuration for a professional manga website.

instructions.Design Philosophy: Ethereal, high-fantasy, and immersive. The UI should feel like a 'Spirit Awakening' ritual—mystical but functional.
instructions.Typography: Headings: Use a clean but slightly ornate serif font for an ancient feel. Body Text: Use high-legibility sans-serif like Plus Jakarta Sans.
instructions.Color Palette: Primary: [Primary Color Palette]. Background: Deep Cultivation Dark (#0a0a14). Text: Ethereal White (#f1f5f9).
instructions.UI Elements: Spirit-ring glow borders with subtle glassmorphism. Use Tailwind CSS for a mobile-first, responsive cultivation-interface layout.

prompts.objective: Create a visually striking landing page that hooks new readers and encourages app installation.
prompts.task: Design the homepage for the manga titled [Manga Title].

instructions.Header (Sticky): Left: [Logo], Center: Navigation (Home, Chapters, Spirits, Settings), Right: 'Start Cultivating' and 'Install App' buttons.
instructions.Hero Section: Full-width [Main cover art] with a floating spirit ring parallax effect. Include Title, Synopsis, and dual 'Awaken (Ch. 1)' and 'Current Rank (Latest)' CTAs.
instructions.Latest Release Section: Grid of the 8 most recent chapters styled as glowing 'Spirit Tablets' with lazy-loaded thumbnails.
instructions.Character Introduction Section: Grid of Shrek Seven Devils using [Character Portraits] with Spirit-Awakening hover animations.
instructions.Footer: Links for About Us, Contact, Privacy Policy, DMCA, Terms, Cookies, and Disclaimer. Author credits and Copyright.

prompts.objective: Provide a clear, easy-to-navigate list of all chapters with offline capabilities.

instructions.Layout: Responsive grid-based list of chapter cards (Spirit Scrolls).
instructions.Cards: Include Chapter Number, Title, Date, Thumbnail. Use Gold border for 'S-Rank' key chapters.
instructions.Features: Searchable SPIRIT_INDEX dropdown with arc-filtering (e.g., Sea God Island Arc). Sort by Newest/Oldest. Save scroll position.

prompts.objective: Create a modern, immersive, and high-performance 'gapless' vertical scrolling reading experience.
prompts.task: Design the manga reader UI (long-strip style).

instructions.Layout: Continuous vertical flow with pure black background. Images must be full-screen (object-fit: contain) for mobile dominance.
instructions.Performance: Implement image chunking and pre-loading. Ensure zero white lines between panels.
instructions.Controls (Overlay): Ethereal glassmorphic overlay on tap. Include progress bar, chapter dropdown, and spirit-power themed navigation.

prompts.objective: Build a database of characters for fans to explore.

instructions.Layout: Responsive grid of character portraits linking to detailed Spirit Profiles.
instructions.Profile View: Display Spirit type, Soul Power Rank, and Spirit Ring configuration alongside Biography.

prompts.objective: Optimize the website for search engines and AI generative crawlers.
prompts.task: Generate SEO metadata and structured data.

instructions.AI-Snippet: Generate 150-word executive summaries for every chapter in a blockquote for GEO extraction.
instructions.Content: Use gpt-oss:120b via Ollama API with 16-key rotation to generate 1500-word tactical reports (Spirit Lore & Cultivation Analysis) for each page.
instructions.Schema: Implement ComicSeries JSON-LD, Book schema, and BreadcrumbList. Generate dynamic sitemap.xml.

prompts.objective: Ensure the website is accessible to all users and loads quickly.
prompts.task: Implement a11y features and performance optimizations.

instructions.Accessibility: Descriptive alt text for soul beast panels, ARIA roles, and high color contrast.
instructions.Performance: Optimize all 360+ chapters to AVIF format. Minify assets and implement Intersection Observer.

prompts.objective: Configure the Web App Manifest for a native 'add to home screen' experience.

instructions.Properties: name: [Manga Title], short_name: [Manga Title], display: 'standalone', theme_color: '#4f46e5'.

prompts.objective: Implement the core service worker for offline functionality.

instructions.Caching: Implement 'Cache First' for app shell and 'Stale-While-Revalidate' for chapters. Enable offline reading for 'Downloaded Spirit Scrolls'.

prompts.objective: Implement features to proactively engage users with new content.
prompts.task: Configure Push API and Background Sync.

instructions.Push Notifications: Request permission via UI. Notify users: 'New Spirit Awakening: Chapter [X] is out!'.
instructions.Background Sync: Check for new releases and pre-cache them automatically during periodic sync.

prompts.objective: Create a settings page for user control over experience and offline data.

instructions.Customization: Toggles for Theme, Reading Mode (Spirit/Scroll), and Notification preferences.
instructions.Storage: Display cultivation-data used quota. Provide 'Purge Low-Level Cache' options to free up local space.
